name: Obsidian Apex
oracle_text:
Alt-Mode (Apex Predator) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 6/4 and it gains trample. Activate only as a sorcery.
Whenever ~ attacks, energize.
flavor_text: Forged in the heat of tectonic shifts, its predatory instinct is as unyielding as its armored shell.
design_notes: Designed for the RG 'Primal Dominance' archetype. This card provides a high-quality combat threat that uses Alt-Mode to shift into an oversized, trampling beast form (6/4). The synergy with Energon—generating a token on attack—supports the theme of high-power, momentum-based gameplay characteristic of Red and Green in this set.
